entries.content: Sunday — special day for Filipinos. Most have the day off so family and friends are complete. Drinking, fun, stories. I cooked chicken tinola for my family — garlic, onion, crushed pepper, ginger, green chili, chili leaves, and sayote. Simple but delicious. Perfect for rainy weather. Happy to share my daily life with you all.
Rainy evening in the Philippines — stayed inside with family (mom, siblings, niece, daughters). Made fried eggplant with bagoong alamang for dinner. Happy to share simple moments together.

Good morning from Philippines! Sunday — favorite day because daughters and I are together. Cooked pork sinigang for lunch — everyone's favorite. Neighbors drinking, many people outside. Church is the tradition. Filipinos love to dance until night. Happy to be part of this life.
